name: Gero signed-connect VERIFY-ONLY fixture (CIP-0186 §connect)
note: Gero (iOS) signs the connect response with Apple CryptoKit's HEDGED Ed25519 (RFC 8032 §8.5): the signature bytes differ on every emit even for identical input, so this is NOT a known-answer vector. Conformance = recompute the canonical subject (sign_006) over the emitted connect URL minus `signature`, then check the Ed25519 signature VERIFIES against `signingPublicKey_b64url` — never byte-match. A conforming verifier MUST accept this case and reject the negatives (tampered query, swapped key, wrong echo).
_fill: Replace the three __PLACEHOLDER__ values below with a real capture off the Gero test dApp. Test keys only — non-secret. signingPublicKey is the session Ed25519 key Gero publishes inside the (unsealed) payload; supply it directly, OR supply dappX25519Secret_hex so the verifier can unseal the payload and extract it itself.
